name: Recruiter: Save recommended matches to the project (automated sourcing)
description: Adds a project's RECOMMENDED candidates (LinkedIn Automated Sourcing → Recommended matches, /discover/automatedSourcing/review) to the pipeline. The recruiter_save_recommendations strategy hovers each recommendation row and clicks its 'Save to first stage' button (data-test-save-to-first-stage), up to target_count (default 10), collecting name+profile_url; verifies the project's ACTIVE count rose. Returns `people` so the backend can push them as linkedin.lead. Params: project_url, target_count.

steps.intent: Add recommended matches to the project
